user.title: Smart Shade Scheduler
user.description: Select the `input_select` helper whose options define your automation modes.

data_description.mode_entity: The input_select whose options define your automation modes.
data_description.dnd_entity: A binary_sensor that is `on` when automation should pause. Overrides the time-based DND window.
data_description.override_duration_entity: An input_number (in hours) controlling how long manual overrides last. Overrides the built-in 4-hour default.
data_description.presence_entity: A zone, binary_sensor, person, or device_tracker entity used to evaluate `home`/`away` conditions in rules.
data_description.workday_entity: A binary_sensor that is `on` on workdays and `off` on days off. Defaults to Monday–Friday when not set. Compatible with the HA Workday integration.

error.no_options: This entity has no options defined. Add at least one option to the input_select first.

abort.already_configured: Smart Shade Scheduler is already configured. The mode entity has been updated.

edit_settings.title: Global settings
edit_settings.description: Rules are managed in the **Shade Scheduler** panel in the sidebar.

data_description.tolerance: A cover is only moved if it deviates more than this many percent from the target.
data_description.dnd_start: No automated movements after this time.
data_description.dnd_end: Automated movements resume at this time.
data_description.wipe_time: All manual overrides are cleared at this time each day.
data_description.override_duration: How long a manual move suppresses automation. Default 2 s (testing). Set to 14400 for 4 hours.
